title: Identity verification
text: Every applicant must present one government-issued identity document. Emirates ID numbers are PII in the decision path and must be scrubbed before any cloud model call (PDPL).

title: Source of funds
text: Corporate accounts require a declared source of funds. A missing or vague source of funds raises the risk rating by one band and must be cited in the rationale.

title: Sanctions screening SOP
text: Screen the applicant name and company name against the sanctions list including known aliases. Any hit mandates a HIGH rating and human review before onboarding.

title: Adverse media
text: Two or more credible adverse media items within five years warrant at least a MEDIUM rating with citations to the items considered.

title: Risk rating rubric
text: LOW: no hits, complete profile. MEDIUM: adverse media or incomplete source of funds. HIGH: any sanctions hit, PEP match, or refusal to provide documents.

title: Human review (HITL)
text: HIGH ratings and any judge-flagged rationale pause for human approval. Account approval is a high-impact action and must never complete without a recorded human decision.

title: Fairness
text: Nationality, gender, and other protected attributes must not influence the risk rating. Paired-profile parity checks are mandatory before any model change is promoted.

title: Citation grounding
text: Every claim in a risk rationale must cite a retrieved policy or evidence document by id. Citations to documents not in the retrieved set are treated as hallucinations and block auto-approval.
